message:
Improve coordinate conversion, rendering performance, and data robustness

TrackContainer coordinate conversion:
- Add bi-directional scroll position conversion between base-pair and amino acid units
- Support all reading frame modes (+1/+2/+3 and -1/-2/-3) with correct offset calculation
- Convert scrollPositionBp from store units (AA positions in AA view mode) to bp coordinates
- Derive zoomScale from global store instead of hardcoded 1.0 value
- Proper clamping ensures coordinates stay within valid genome/AA length bounds
- Extract viewMode and readingFrame from store for context-aware scrolling

CanvasSequenceGridRenderer LRU cache optimization:
- Replace O(n log n) sort-based eviction with O(n*k) selection algorithm
- Fast path: single entry eviction finds minimum in single pass O(n)
- General case: collect k oldest entries in O(n*k) where k is typically 1-3
- For incremental cache growth (adding 1 tile at a time), this is effectively O(n)
- Previous sort was overkill since we typically evict only 1-2 entries per overflow

PackagingMotorVisualizer history normalization:
- Add robust type handling for history array with optional/aliased fields
- Support both 'time'/'t' and 'fill'/'fillFraction' field aliases
- Implement normalizeNumber() helper for safe NaN/undefined → fallback conversion
- Clamp fill values to [0, 1] range to prevent rendering artifacts
- Properly type state.history instead of using 'any' cast

DatabaseLoader worker cleanup:
- Unconditionally null gzipWorker reference after terminate()
- Terminated workers cannot be reused, so always clear the reference
- If a concurrent call created a new worker, it will be recreated on next use
- Removes race condition where stale worker reference could cause issues

Minor improvements:
- BottomSheet: Touch handling refinements
- GenomicSignaturePCAOverlay: Small stability fix
- useGestures: Gesture handling improvements

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
